note: This hash is binding. The C-009 session-level objective weights (novelty=1.0, progression=0.5, redundancy=1.0, session_coverage=2.0, cell_repulsion=0.75, exploration=0.1) and class name TraceGreedyPolicy are frozen for n=50/100 scale experiments.
